description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit constructed primarily from light-colored wood, featuring a simple and modern design. The structure consists of four open shelves, each supported by vertical side panels, with no doors or back panel openings. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage or display space for books, decor, or other items. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and warm appearance. The overall build is sturdy, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments. The open design allows for easy access from the front, making it practical for use in public or communal spaces.
description: A tall, light wood shelving unit with four open shelves and a minimalist, modern design. The open structure and visible wood grain make it suitable for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the full height of the shelving unit, with visible wood grain and no doors or handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the solid side panel, with the open structure visible through the shelf gaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the overall rectangular shape, with no openings or features on the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the depth and open shelf structure from the other side.
